title: Event log entry
description: A single JSONL entry in a feature's event log. Event log semantics are defined in orchestrator-architecture.md §7.3.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset (e.g. 2026-04-20T14:32:05Z or 2026-04-20T10:32:05-04:00).

event_type.description: Minimum event type set from architecture §7.3. New types must be registered in this schema before use.

source.description: Emitter of the event: a fixed role (`specs`, `pm`, `qa`, `config-steward`, `merge-watcher`), a component agent scoped by repo (`component:<name>`), or `human`. For `component:<name>`, `<name>` is the bare component repository name with no owner prefix — the short form of the git remote (e.g. `component:api-sample`, not `component:acme/api-sample`). This matches the `source: component:<repo>` convention used across roles; the PM and QA agents emit events with `source: pm` and `source: qa` respectively (no repo suffix, since those roles are not scoped by component repo).

source_version.description: Agent configuration version in effect when the event was emitted. Format is semver-like but not enforced here; `human` events use the orchestration repo commit SHA or `n/a`.

payload.description: Event-specific structured content. Per-type payload schemas will be added under /shared/schemas/events/ as they stabilize.
